[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 111111111 a
4 111111111 a
5 111110111 8
6 111111111 a
7 111110111 8

23 32 111111001 7

45 54 111011111 8
56 65 111110101 7
67 76 101110101 6
70 07 111111000 6

13 31 111111111 a match 0 1 2 3 4 6

47 74 111111111 a match 0 1 2 3 4 6

72 27 111111001 7

26 62 011101101 6
